nasb.text: The floods have lifted up, O Lord, The floods have lifted up their voice, The floods lift up their pounding waves.

esv.text: The floods have lifted up, O Lord, the floods have lifted up their voice; the floods lift up their roaring.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！大水揚起了， 大水揚起了聲音， 大水揚起了澎湃的波浪。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊， 大海澎湃怒吼，波浪滔天。

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，洪流扬起—— 洪流扬起它们的声音， 洪流扬起它们的涛声！
